title: "The Faith And Obedience Of Abraham" Genesis 22:1-24

notes.introduction: An exposition of Genesis 22:1-24 on the faith, obedience, surrender, and sacrifice of Abraham at Mount Moriah, with extended treatment of the passage as a type of Christ's substitutionary atonement at Calvary.

sections.heading: Mount Moriah as a Scripture peak
The testimony of Abraham: faith and obedience
Hebrews 11 and Abraham's faith in resurrection
God's provision and the Abrahamic Covenant reconfirmed
Introduction of Rebecca in the narrative
Genesis 22 as a type of Christ's atonement
